description:
The quiz assesses advanced JavaScript error‑handling knowledge, focusing on nuanced cases like serialization pitfalls and cross‑context instanceof issues. It is positioned at a challenging level, using a tone that is both encouraging and slightly tongue‑in‑cheek to motivate seasoned developers to test their expertise.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, Serialization errors, Cross‑context instanceof behavior, Advanced try‑catch patterns, Debugging strategies
Audience: Intermediate to senior JavaScript developers who want to benchmark and sharpen their error‑handling skills.
